page_content:
ARHU309 Writers’ House Colloquium: Creative Writing in Community (1-3 Credits)

Colloquium designed to improve students’ skills in literary and communication arts through lectures, workshop and discussions on

the history and craft of writing across cultures. Topics include poetry

and fiction in translation, and exploration of modes of critique, elements of craft of fiction and poetry, writing for different media, genre writing, writing for performance, screen or scriptwriting and creative non-fiction. Prerequisite: Permission of ARHU-College of Arts & Humanities; and must be admitted to the Jimenez-Porter Writers’ House.

Repeatable to: 6 credits if content differs.
